questionHtml: Suggest a reason for the changes in mass in the colonies between weeks 6 and 8.
markschemeHtml:
1. less production of honey/wax;
  2. fewer bees/dispersal of bees/queens;
  3. bad weather/environmental change/predators/disease/pests;

meta.title: Suggest a reason for the changes in mass in the colonies between weeks 6 and 8.
